audit_items.proof_trace: http.c contains zero free() calls across all three functions (parse_http_header, get_header, next_header); the only heap allocation is malloc() at get_header L109, which is returned to the caller who bears deallocation responsibility per the documented API contract. The assertion 'forall free(p) in http.c: no_use(p) after free(p)' is vacuously satisfied since no free(p) exists in scope.
